findings.html: <button type="button" class="absolute top-2 right-2 text-muted-foreground hover:text-primary transition-colors p-1 rounded hover:bg-muted" title="Maximize">
findings.summary: All touch targets must be 24px large, or leave sufficient space
findings.evidence:
Fix any of the following:
  Target has insufficient size (22px by 22px, should be at least 24px by 24px)
  Target has insufficient space to its closest neighbors. Safe clickable space has a diameter of 22px instead of at least 24px.

findings.summary: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds
findings.evidence:
Fix any of the following:
  Element content contains only non-text characters
findings.remediation: Manually verify this condition before treating it as a confirmed defect.

findings.html: Cancel
findings.summary: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds
findings.evidence:
Fix any of the following:
  Element's background color could not be determined because it's partially obscured by another element
findings.remediation: Manually verify this condition before treating it as a confirmed defect.
